data.revised_prompt: photorealistic cinematic Japanese drama film still, professional 30-minute book-summary video visual, warm natural movie lighting, detailed lived-in interior, emotional quiet realism, Kamakura letter shop mood, red camellia motif, paper letters and fountain pen, 16:9, no readable text. Do not show crowds. Scene 18/24, Reconciliation object. Specific shot: single protagonist sits before a low table with old letters and an empty chair across from her, softened expression, dusk light. Connect to subtitle theme without drawing readable words: 我们很多人都要到长大后甚至到对方离开后才慢慢看见父母或祖父母的人生他们不是天生的长辈他们也曾年轻也曾笨拙也曾在深夜里不知如何是好看见这一点并不会让过去的伤自动消失却会让心里的硬块稍微松动鸠子的成长不是变得更强势而是变得更能容纳复杂她开始明白一个人可以既伤害过你也爱过你一段感情可以
